Ministry of Transport Malaysia
Turn on more accessible mode
Turn off more accessible mode
Official Malaysian Government Website Here's how you know ▼
🏛️
Official government websites end with .gov.my

If the link does not end with .gov.my, exit the website immediately even if it looks similar.

🔒
Secure websites use HTTPS

Look for a lock (🔐) or https:// as an added precaution. If not present, do not share any sensitive information.

  • Current:
    Air Accident and Serious Incident Report (AAIB)

Air Accident and Serious Incident Report (AAIB)

​​

P​lease Choose Report by Year​​:​

​​​​
Report for year 2026Report for year 2025Report for year 2024Report for year 2023Report for year 2022Report for year 2021Report for year 2020Report for year 2019Report for year 2018Report for year 2017Report for year 2016Report for year 2015Report for year 2014
​​
​
​​​

Any Enquiries please Contact AAIB :

Office Address
Air Accident Investigation Bureau​,
Ministry ​of ​Transport
Level​ 8, No. 26, Jalan Tun Hussein, Precint 4
62100 W.P. Putrajaya​, Malaysi​a​​

AAIB Hotline
03-8892 8080

Email Address
AAIB@mot.gov.my​​​​​​​​​​​​​
